metadata.name: District Boards Commissions and Councils
metadata.description: The District of Columbia Mayor has structurally aligned boards and commissions with programmatic and operational clusters in District government. Most boards and commissions are governed by an organizational functions of an executive agency and have an administrator as a primary liaison.
